Notice Of Motion For An Order Compelling Answers To Form Interrogatories, Set One, And Deeming Admitted The Truth Of Matters Specified In Request For Admissions, Set One; And Awarding Monetary Sanctions Against Juvin Flores Villanueva
Off Calendar Feb-02-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING.
Defendant El Trebol Bar Inc.'s Motion for An Order Compelling Answers to Form Interrogatories, Set One, And Deeming Admitted The Truth of Matters Specified in Request For Admissions, Set One, and Awarding Sanctions against Juvin Flores Villanueva: the motion is hereby GRANTED. Plaintiff Juvin Flores Villanueva shall serve verified Responses to Form Interrogatories Set Number One within 20 days of this order. All objections to Form Interrogatories have been waived. The truth of the matters specified in the Request for Admissions Set Number One are deemed admitted. The court grants sanctions against Juvin Flores Villanueva under CCP 2033.280 in the amount of $390.00 to be paid to the moving party within 30 days of this order. No sanctions are awarded pursuant to CCP 2030.290 as the moving party did not meet and confer with the Plaintiff prior to filing this motion. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE D. PEEBLES; CLERK: JOHNNY SENGMANY; NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2016 Continued To Dec-20-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Oct-11-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Milton Katz, Esq. (415.441.5400) appears as moving counsel/attorney seeking to withdraw as counsel for plaintiff

Juvin Flores Villanueva appears as plaintiff

Court hears from counsel and client. Ray Carrasco interprets English/Spanish for plaintiff, Ms. Villanueva.

COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF JUVIN VILLANUEVA'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL TO BE RELIEVED AS ATTORNEY OF RECORD is DENIED without prejudice due to the client's failure to understand the motion.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR No. 5976, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-29-2016 Continued To Nov-22-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendant El Trebol Bar, Inc., To Set Aside Default And For Leave To Defend The Action
Off Calendar Sep-29-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT EL TREBOL BAR, INC.'S Motion Of Defendant El Trebol Bar, Inc., To Set Aside Default And For Leave To Defend The Action is GRANTED. Defendant filed the motion within the time limitations of CCP 473, the declaration of Mr. Franco demonstrates excusable neglect, and El Trebol Bar provides a proposed pleading. Plaintiff did not substantively oppose the motion and there is a strong policy to hear cases on the merits. There is no basis to continue this motion. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Sep-14-2016 Continued To Oct-11-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Milton Katz, Esq. (415-441-5400) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance made in this matter.

Plaintiff counsel explains to the court that the motion was not properly served. Request for continuance is granted. PLAINTIFF JUVIN VILLANUEVA'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is CONTINUED to October 11, 2016 at 9:30 AM in Department 302. Moving part shall give notice and file proof of service.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR #59761, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)
